meaning: n.规划,设计,(书刊等)编排,版面,配线,企划,设计图案,(工厂等的)布局图 版面设计
examples: The layout is hard to fault ergonomically.
He tried to recall the layout of the farmhouse.
A diagram of the new road layout was superimposed on a map of the city.
The Attias make some lavish claims for what a circular layout does for building efficiency.
To a standard silicon layout from ARM, Luminary adds functions like Ethernet connections, flash memory and motion-control hardware.
